Services & Packages

Comprehensive funeral cover plans designed around your family's needs and budget.

Our Plans

Choose Your Cover Plan

All plans include professional, compassionate service from our experienced team. Monthly premiums are fixed with no hidden fees.

Comfort Plan
R170 / month
R15,000
funeral cover
✓
Professional embalming & preparation
✓
Standard coffin – choice of 3 options
✓
Hearse transport within 50km
✓
One night viewing at our parlour
✓
Administrative & paperwork assistance
✓
1 Spouse + up to 4 children covered
✗
Extended family not included
⏳ 6-month waiting period applies
Choose Comfort

funeral cover

Hearse transport within 100km

Two nights viewing at our parlour
✓
Catering for up to 50 guests
✓
Floral arrangements included
✓
1 Spouse + up to 6 children covered
✓
Up to 2 extended family members
⏳ 3-month waiting period applies

funeral cover

Hearse + 2 additional family vehicles
✓
Three nights viewing at our parlour
✓
Full catering for up to 100 guests
✓
Premium floral arrangements
✓
Tombstone contribution (R3,000)
✓
1 Spouse + up to 8 children covered
✓
Up to 4 extended family members
⏳ 1-month waiting period applies

Beyond the Plan

Additional Services

We offer a range of additional services that can be arranged alongside any plan. Contact us to discuss your specific needs.

✈️
International Repatriation
We coordinate the repatriation of remains to neighbouring countries including Botswana, Zimbabwe, and Mozambique. Documentation and logistics handled end-to-end.
🏠
Home Collection
Available 24/7 across our service areas. Our trained team responds with dignity and care at any hour, including weekends and public holidays.
📋
Death Registration Assistance
Navigating government paperwork during bereavement is difficult. We assist families with death certificates, DHA forms, and SASSA notifications.
🕯️
Memorial & Tombstone Services
We partner with tombstone suppliers and can assist families in organising memorial services and unveilings months after the initial funeral.
🌸
Grief Counselling Referral
Grief is a journey. We maintain referral relationships with registered counsellors and can connect families with bereavement support services.
🎵
Choir & Programme Coordination
We can help coordinate funeral programmes, church choirs, PA systems, and audio-visual tribute presentations to honour your loved one.
Ready to Get Started?

Register today and secure your family's future.

Cover starts from just R170 per month. No medical tests required. Quick, simple registration.

Register Now Contact Us
